configuration.drl_training_status: frozen legacy policy: structurally compatible, but training provenance and compatibility with the corrected active-lifecycle timing calibration are unverified; retraining is required for optimized-policy claims

drl_training_status: frozen legacy policy: structurally compatible, but training provenance and compatibility with the corrected active-lifecycle timing calibration are unverified; retraining is required for optimized-policy claims

metric_definitions.cycle_time_days: Mean arrival-to-completion time for arrivals that complete during the 180-day drain.
metric_definitions.completed_within_arrival_window: Number of arrivals completed by the day-30 cutoff.
metric_definitions.completion_share: Share of arrivals completing during the drain; used as a censoring guard, not as the throughput outcome.
metric_definitions.occupation: Busy time overlapping realized availability during the fixed 30-day arrival window, divided by that availability.
